title: Avoid side effects in Type-Checking Functions
description: This rule checks for side effects within type-checking functions (tffunctions). Side effects can lead to unexpected behavior and make the code harder to understand, maintain, and test.
message: Avoid side effects in this tffunction
recommendation: Refactor the tffunction to remove any side effects

noncompliant.description: This tffunction has a side effect (print statement)

compliant.description: This tffunction does not have any side effects

why_is_this_an_issue: Side effects can lead to unexpected behavior and make the code harder to understand, maintain, and test.
how_to_fix: Refactor the tffunction to remove any side effects.

logic.function_code:
def is_side_effect_in_tffunction(node):
    if 'print' in node.body and node.decl:  # Check if the function has a print statement and is a tffunction
        return True
    return False

metadata.title: Avoid side effects in Type-Checking Functions
